description:
This step allows you to create and manage employee records for your institute in a structured and efficient way.

You can add essential details such as employee name, email address, department, and designation to maintain a well-organized workforce database.

Each employee is automatically linked to the associated company, ensuring consistency across your organizational structure and simplifying administrative processes.

You also have the option to create a user account for the employee, enabling secure desk access. By assigning roles and permissions, you can control what each employee can view or manage within the system.

Completing this step helps streamline HR operations, improves internal coordination, and ensures all employee information is centralized and easily accessible.
name: Create Employee records
title: Employee Record Creation and Management
